---
title: "Assignment3 Report"
author: "Tin Nguyen, Waranya Ratirotjanakul, Amisha Vatsa, Inayat Gill"
date: today
format: 
    html:
        theme: cosmo
        toc: true
        smooth-scroll: true
    typst: 
        documentclass: article
        toc: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# load all required libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(ggplot2)
```

# Executive summary

# Introduction 

# Methodology
## Dataset Introduction 

## Dataset Description

## Dataset summary 

# Results

# Discussion, conclusion and recommendations

# References
